/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/controllers/ConceptoController.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/controllers/EmisorController.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/controllers/FacturaController.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/controllers/ReceptorController.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/controllers/TodoController.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/models/Concepto.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/models/Emisor.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/models/Factura.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/models/Receptor.cc.o CMakeFiles/api_server.dir/models/Todo.cc.o -o api_server  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpq.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
